title.ko: 유체 연료(FLUID FUEL) 또는 공기중에 현탁된 고체 연료를 이용한 연소 방법 또는 장치(버너 F23D]
title.en: METHODS OR APPARATUS FOR COMBUSTION USING FLUID FUEL OR SOLID FUEL SUSPENDED IN AIR (burners F23D)

definition.ko: 2 또는 그 이상의 타입의 연료의 연소에 특히 적합한 연소 장치 F23C1/00 2 또는 그 이상의 연소실의 조합 F23C6/00 기능 타입의 연소 장치 유동층 연소 F23C10/00 촉매 연소 F23C13/00 공명 연소 F23C15/00 서브 시스템에 의해 특징 지어지는 연소 장치 연소 장치 F23C3/00 버너의 배치 또는 설치 F23C5/00 공기 공급 F23C7/00 연소 가스 또는 연소 생성물을 되돌리는 장치 F23C9/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제 사항 F23C99/00

title.ko: 둘 이상 종류의 연료를 동시에 또는 교대로 연소하는 것에 특별히 적합한 연소 장치이며, 그 연료의 적어도 하나의 종류는 유체 연료 또는 공기중에 현탁된 고체 연료인 것(둘 이상의 연소실의 조합에 특징이 있는 연소 장치 F23C 6/00; 불씨; 점화기(pilot flame igniters) F23Q 9/00)
title.en: Combustion apparatus specially adapted for combustion of two or more kinds of fuel simultaneously or alternately, at least one kind of fuel being either a fluid fuel or a solid fuel suspended in air (combustion apparatus characterised by the combination of two or more combustion chambers F23C0006000000;pilot flame igniters F23Q0009000000)
lump and liquid fuel
lump and gaseous fuel
lump and pulverulent fuel
liquid and gaseous fuel
liquid and pulverulent fuel
gaseous and pulverulent fuel

title.ko: 연소실의 형상에 특징이 있는 연소 장치(F23C 15/00가 우선)
title.en: Combustion apparatus characterised by the shape of the combustion chamber (F23C0015000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 버너의 배치 및 설치에 특징이 있는 연소 장치
title.en: Combustion apparatus characterised by the arrangement or mounting of burners
Structural details of mounting
Provision for adjustment of burner position during operation
Disposition of burners

title.ko: 집중 또는 실질상 평면형의 단일화염, 예. 연필형 또는 시트형 화염을 얻기 위한 것(F23C 5/32가 우선)
title.en: to obtain a single flame of concentrated or substantially planar form, e.g. pencil or sheet flame (F23C0005320000 takes precedence)
to obtain a loop flame
to obtain flames in opposing directions, e.g. impacting flames
to obtain rotating flames, i.e. flames moving helically or spirally
Combustion apparatus characterised by the combination of two or more combustion chambers
in parallel arrangement
in series connection

title.ko: 공기 공급 장치에 특징이 있는 연소 장치(유동화를 실시하는 공기의 입구 F23C 10/20)
title.en: Combustion apparatus characterised by arrangements for air supply (inlets for fluidisation air F23C0010200000;baffles or shields with air supply passages F23M0009040000)
Disposition of air supply not passing through burner
to obtain maximum heat transfer to wall of combustion chamber
for heating the incoming air (arrangements of regenerators or recuperators F23L0015000000)
indirectly by a secondary fluid other than the combustion products

title.ko: 연소 생성물 또는 연소 가스를 연소실에 되돌리는 장치에 특징이 있는 연소 장치(층으로부터 부유 한 입자를 재순환시키기 위한 수단을 가지는 유동층 연소 장치 F23C 10/02; 층으로부터 물질을 제거 및 부분적으로 재도입하는 장치를 가지는 유체층 연소 장치 F23C 10/26)
title.en: Combustion apparatus characterised by arrangements for returning combustion products or flue gases to the combustion chamber (fluidised bed combustion apparatus with means for recirculation of particles entrained from the bed F23C0010020000;fluidised bed combustion apparatus with devices for removal and partial reintroduction of material from the bed F23C0010260000)
for completing combustion
for reducing temperature in combustion chamber, e.g. for protecting walls of combustion chamber

title.ko: 연소가 연료 또는 다른 입자의 유동층에서 발생하는 장치
title.en: Apparatus in which combustion takes place in a fluidised bed of fuel or other particles

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 인덱싱 코드 F23C 101/00을 부여하는 것이 바람직하다.

title.en: in a fluidised bed of catalytic particles
with means specially adapted for achieving or promoting a circulating movement of particles within the bed or for a recirculation of particles entrained from the bed
the particles being circulated to a section, e.g. a heat-exchange section or a return duct, at least partially shielded from the combustion zone, before being reintroduced into the combustion zone
the circulating movement being promoted by inducing differing degrees of fluidisation in different parts of the bed
characterised by the arrangement of separation apparatus, e.g. cyclones, for separating particles from the flue gases
the separation apparatus being located outside the combustion chamber
the particles being circulated exclusively within the combustion zone
the circulating movement being promoted by inducing differing degrees of fluidisation in different parts of the bed
specially adapted for operation at superatmospheric pressures, e.g. by the arrangement of the combustion chamber and its auxiliary systems inside a pressure vessel
Details; Accessories
Inlets for fluidisation air, e.g. grids; Bottoms

title.ko: 유동상(fluidised bed) 연소장치에 특별히 적합한 연료 공급기(F23C 10/26 우선)
title.en: Fuel feeders specially adapted for fluidised bed combustion apparatus (F23C0010260000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 상(bed)에서 물질을 제거하기 위한 장치(상의 높이나 상의 물질의 양을 조절하기 위한 장치 F23C 10/30)
title.en: Devices for removal of material from the bed (devices for controlling the level of the bed or the amount of material in the bed F23C0010300000)
combined with devices for partial reintroduction of material into the bed, e.g. after separation of agglomerated parts
Control devices specially adapted for fluidised bed combustion apparatus
for controlling the level of the bed or the amount of material in the bed
by controlling the rate of recirculation of particles separated from the flue gases

title.ko: 연소가 촉매 내에서 발생하는 장치(촉매 입자의 유동층에 있는 것 F23C 10/01；무염 연소를 위한 촉매를 이용하는 복사 가스 버너 F23D14/18)
title.en: Apparatus in which combustion takes place in the presence of catalytic material (in a fluidised bed of catalytic particles F23C0010010000;radiant gas burners using catalysis for flameless combustion F23D0014180000)
characterised by arrangements for starting the operation, e.g. for heating the catalytic material to operating temperature
characterised by the arrangement of two or more catalytic elements in series connection
in which non-catalytic combustion takes place in addition to catalytic combustion, e.g. downstream of a catalytic element
characterised by the catalytic material
Apparatus in which combustion takes place in pulses influenced by acoustic resonance in a gas mass
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
Indexing scheme associated with group F23C0010000000, relating to combustion in entrained fluidised beds.
Combustion in entrained fluidised beds, i.e. fluidised beds which have no distinct upper surface
